title: Ambient Air Pollution Source Attribution And Health Impact In Megacities
summary: Build a verified workflow for attributing ambient air pollution to source sectors and estimating sector-specific health impacts in LMIC megacities.
why_it_matters: Build a verified workflow for attributing ambient air pollution to source sectors and estimating sector-specific health impacts in LMIC megacities.

success_metrics.target: Every claim links dated evidence with methodology.
